title: callerya lantsangensis
intro: Callerya lantsangensis, also known as Himalayan milk vine or Himalayan twining pea, is a perennial vine native to the Himalayas. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, as well as its potential to treat fever and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Callerya lantsangensis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to protect against cell damage, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. Callerya lantsangensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of Asia, including India, China, and Nepal.
